positive: Minimalist geometric line art illustration of a graceful mountain range silhouette under a vast, stylized crescent moon and constellations. The design features clean, flowing lines in deep sapphire blue and ethereal gold, contrasted against a crisp off-white background. Focus on strong negative space, symmetrical composition, and abstract natural elements. Scandinavian hygge aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Vector graphic style, high detail, isolated on white background.
